on_screen_text: I would like her to go to daycare before I come here to work.
We have been here for many years to come
我有幸代表CAAAN在中国城。/ I have the offices of CAAAN here in Chinatown.
Julia Ba, Deputy Mayor for Economic Justice (lower-third name tag)
劳动者和中国城居民的声音 / raise up the voices of working people and residents of Chinatown.
Coalition Against Anti-Asian Violence (CAAV) (visible on banner/signage)

frames.presentation_style: Documentary-style community visit to Chinatown. Bilingual Chinese/English captions. Features Deputy Mayor Julia Ba with community members. Focused on working-class immigrant experience.

on_screen_text: 一整天在服装厂工作，就付几美元 / A single day at the garment factory would net for hours
在服装厂工作，日薪 / working at a restaurant or a garment
基本上我们有这句说法 / Basically we have this old saying:
基本上，每个住户 / Basically, among every living expense
租金是最大的负担 / rent is the biggest burden.
我们生活非常节省。 / We live very frugally.
frames.setting: Chinatown street-level footage — produce vendors, building facades, garment worker interviews. Older Chinese women speaking on camera about their lives. Chinatown storefronts and outdoor market.

older Chinese women in winter coats (interview subjects)
frames.presentation_style: Street-level documentary. Focus on working-class Chinatown residents' economic pressures. Bilingual captions continue. Personal financial testimony from older immigrant women.

on_screen_text: 在我们今后的所有工作中，你们至关重要 / And you matter in everything we're going to do moving forward.
谢谢大家。/ So, thank you.
